attributes.description: Insider-threat-focused view of Windows Registry findings parsed by RECmd (Eric Zimmerman) via KAPE, using a curated batch file (Kroll_Batch / DFIRBatch). Each panel surfaces a different forensic angle pulled from one heterogeneous CSV. Use alongside the LNK, EVTX, Prefetch, and Shellbags dashboards for a complete user-activity picture.
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"re-p1","w":48,"x":0,"y":0},"panelIndex":"re-p1","panelRefName":"panel_re-p1","title":"All Registry Activity (timeline)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"re-p2","w":24,"x":0,"y":12},"panelIndex":"re-p2","panelRefName":"panel_re-p2","title":"Program Execution (BAM, AppCompat, Amcache, UserAssist, MUICache)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"re-p3","w":24,"x":24,"y":12},"panelIndex":"re-p3","panelRefName":"panel_re-p3","title":"Typed / MRU User Input (RunMRU, TypedPaths, RecentDocs, Office MRUs)","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"re-p4","w":24,"x":0,"y":24},"panelIndex":"re-p4","panelRefName":"panel_re-p4","title":"USB Devices + Network Shares + WiFi/VPN","type":"search"},{"embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"gridData":{"h":12,"i":"re-p5","w":24,"x":24,"y":24},"panelIndex":"re-p5","panelRefName":"panel_re-p5","title":"Cloud Sync + Persistence + Threat Hunting","type":"search"}]
attributes.title: Registry — Insider Threat
